query: SELECT id, status, errorMessage, transcript, structureBlueprint FROM ugc_uploads WHERE id = 30004;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user By5XkGQEgEMb8WB.3b48d8604568 --database iRMuHk7nYQvS4BtpbvEbBz --execute SELECT id, status, errorMessage, transcript, structureBlueprint FROM ugc_uploads WHERE id = 30004;

rows.transcript: This thermogenic fat burner actually works. Hyperburn is made in Australia with scientifically proven ingredients. The formula is designed to target the root cause of weight gain. This means that it boosts metabolism, naturally reduces cravings and improves energy and focus. It also comes in 7 delicious and refreshing flavours. My favourite is pink lemonade. I literally feel like a new person and can't recommend it highly enough. If you click the link below, you can get yours before they sell out.
